name: WorkAdventure
description: Open-source virtual world platform with real-time multiplayer rooms, built for browser-based 2D metaverse experiences.

notes.text: First installation/build can take a long time due to Node/TypeScript compilation.

The upstream containerized setup relies on multiple services (play, back, map-storage). This ProxmoxVED CT installs sources and attempts to start the stack via npm scripts; if upstream changes start commands, adjust systemd ExecStart accordingly.
